name: Poland
contextBlurb: Poland's housing portfolio sits under Krzysztof Paszyk (PSL), Minister of Development and Technology. The Polish mortgage market is shaped by UOKiK guidance promoting safer fixed-rate hipoteczny products. The Sejm has also been examining a property cadastral tax. Available source coverage does not yet show a comprehensive package of housing bills in active legislation.

legislation.title: Safe Mortgage Loan Standard Contract per UOKiK
legislation.summary: Introduces a model for a safe and transparent mortgage loan agreement based on a fixed interest rate over a defined period, aimed at protecting consumers buying homes on credit.
